CustomField.description: If the applicant's rent at the time of income certification is higher than the rent of the unit they are applying for, this field will show that they are eligible for a waiver (45%).
CustomField.formula:
IF(TEXT(IAW_R_3x_Rent_Requirement_z__c) = "", " Missing Expense Variable",
IF(AND(TEXT(IAW_R_3x_Rent_Requirement_z__c) = "No", HOMEtracker__Current_Monthly_Rent__c > IAW_Rent__c), "Eligible",
"Not Eligible"))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the applicant's rent at the time of income certification is higher than the rent of the unit they are applying for, this field will show that they are eligible for a waiver (45%).
CustomField.label: Higher Rent Waiver?
